prompt: The bounce strategy analysis cron (95cc2cfd) failed today. It only ran for 50 seconds instead of the usual 3-5 minutes. The summary mentions something about 'allowlist miss'. The session transcript is at /tmp/strategy-failed-session.jsonl. Diagnose what happened and recommend a fix.

assertions.text: Identifies E1 pattern: exec host parameter (auto/node) rejected by gateway
